Satchel Sized Mag of Holding.Description:
This oddly proportioned ammo container defies all logic
It holds an absurd amount of rounds, yet weighs almost nothing when empty
A SCAV scavenged it from an abandoned hideout, convinced it was some experimental military prototype
After forcing it into a rifle, he found that the bullets stored inside refused to chamber-just vanishing instead
While utterly useless as a firearm mag, it proved to be an excellent way to carry extra ammo
